field_values.scene_title: Introduce the scale of Martian technology and transition from surviva...
field_values.action_summary: After fifteen days of travel, the protagonist discovers a massive, four-square-mile atmosphere factory. He successfully navigates the automated entry systems to enter the facility.
field_values.camera_intent: Extreme wide shots (establishing scale); Low-angle shots of the factory walls; Medium shots of the automated doors operating.
movement_notes: Scale of the machinery relative to the character.
field_values.transition_notes:

## Production Intent

Introduce the scale of Martian technology and transition from survival to mystery.

## Storyboard

After fifteen days of travel, the protagonist discovers a massive, four-square-mile atmosphere factory. He successfully navigates the automated entry systems to enter the facility.
